subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O our God, our Sovereign and our Master, inasmuch as Thou hast awakened us through Thy most sweet call and made known unto us Thy Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهنا و سلطاننا و مالکنا بما ایقظتنا بندآئک الاحلی و عرفتنا جمالک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
